mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT m.perms FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN sys_role r ON rm.role_id = r.id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.company_id = #{companyId} AND r.status = 1 AND m.status = 1 AND m.perms IS NOT NULL AND m.perms != ''

SELECT DISTINCT m.id, m.subject_type, m.menu_name, m.parent_id, m.menu_type, m.path, m.component, m.perms, m.icon, m.order_num, m.is_visible, m.status, m.create_time FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN sys_role r ON rm.role_id = r.id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.company_id = #{companyId} AND r.status = 1 AND m.status = 1 AND m.menu_type IN ('M', 'C') AND m.is_visible = 1 ORDER BY m.parent_id, m.order_num
